refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be dirty and unhygienic, with a trash can present. The toilet is also visible in the image.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was filthy and had a strong unpleasant odor. The trash can was not emptied and there were visible stains on the floor. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and smells bad.
